arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Blackburn Rovers with one big doubt and two players sidelined
arts.sum: Describing eighth-placed Rovers as "one of the top teams in the division", Farke said: “It's a tough test for us and it will be another difficult game, but we don't complain, we just want to make sure that we are on it again. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Leeds United promotion race takes new twist after Sheffield United vs Sunderland amid double boost
arts.sum: The Whites went into the weekend at the top of the Championship table, but knew they would lose that place with second place Sheffield United and fourth placed Sunderland facing each other at Bramall Lane on Friday night. While that moves them above Leeds and to the top of the Championship table, it also means that the Whites can open up a five-point gap on Sunderland should they beat Blackburn Rovers at Ewood Park on Saturday (1.30pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Leeds United man surely set for exit, it should open door for eye-catching replacement
arts.sum: Leeds United forward Joe Gelhardt looks virtually certain to be leaving the club on loan in the new year with vast amounts of interest already emerging and playing time scarce under Daniel Farke. A report from the Yorkshire Evening Post this week shared that Leeds forward Gelhardt is open to leaving the club in the new year.

arts.ttl: Is Blackburn Rovers vs Leeds United on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community If you join our WhatsApp community, we will send links to the blog and post-match analysis straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Leeds United summer signing already surprised by what Daniel Farke has done with him
arts.sum: Leeds United full-back Isaac Schmidt has yet to really announce himself to the club and fans yet with minimal opportunities thus far under Daniel Farke, but he’s happy with the start he’s made since leaving St Gallen. Schmidt’s £2.5million move from Swiss club St Gallen was an intriguing transfer, with Leeds landing one of the most versatile footballers you’d wish to have, while demonstrating his quality in his final game for his former club, scoring a stunning goal in Europa Conference League qualifying against Trabzonspor to help them qualify for the full competition.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Blackburn Rovers vs. Leeds United
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Blackburn Rovers vs. Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Insider tips Leeds to make remarkable move for Premier League striker recently linked with Man Utd
arts.sum: Leeds United could be set to pull off a sensational swoop for talented Brighton striker Evan Ferguson in January. That’s according to the club’s former goalkeeper Paul Robinson, who believes a move to Elland Road could be hugely beneficial to both player and club. arts.ttl: FA Cup third round draw, start time, ball numbers, TV channel with Leeds United in the hat
arts.sum: Daniel Farke's side made it through to the fifth round last term, beating Peterborough United and Plymouth Argyle. Kelly Somers will host the draw, with ex-Manchester United strikers Mark Hughes and Dion Dublin drawing the teams.

arts.ttl: Championship boss rules out January transfer move for 'fantastic' Leeds United player
arts.sum: He has played obviously also for us and for this club a bit more like a winger who comes inside. A number of niggly injuries has also limited Gelhardt's game time this season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United 'divas' comment in clearest clue yet of Brenden Aaronson's selection fate
arts.sum: “He's so crucial for us because we have many players who make things happen, more or less out of winger positions or pocket positions, we have our creativity from the wing and our quality with goals and assists and we need, in the centre of the park, a player who also covers lots of distance. Goals and assists continue to flow from all but one part of Leeds United’s attack, making it hard to ignore Brenden Aaronson as a candidate for the chop.
